title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: I think you should take more exercise.

questions.firstSentence: Someone is delivering a parcel for you.
It's the first time she has flown in a helicopter.
questions.secondSentence: She has (1) _________ in a helicopter before.

questions.firstSentence: He is not as well-organised as his partner.
The children persuaded their father to buy a dog.
She started her own business despite the risks.
questions.secondSentence: She started her own business (1) _________ there were risks.

questions.firstSentence: He was in the habit of cycling to work.
